notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela steals (7) 2nd base. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Ceddanne Rafaela advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Josh Jung. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras reached on error
